creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Emmanuel Vadot from comment #1)
> we don't care about 11.3 for xwayland as it doesn't have evdev(4) enabled in GENERIC

xwayland has just 2 consumers in ports: plasma5-kwin and wlroots (e.g., sway, hikari). Both use libinput. Not sure about the former but wlroots won't work on 11.3 without the following:
https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/kms-drm/pull/213 (already required)
https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/kms-drm/pull/211 (soon to be required)

swc (not packaged in FreeBSD but exists in PkgSrc) doesn't use evdev/libinput but also no longer supports xwayland, see https://github.com/michaelforney/swc/issues/49
